name: Cluster Observability
description: Operational monitoring and anomaly triage for large-scale compute clusters.

panels.title: Fleet Health
panels.summary: Rank clusters and hosts by operational risk and stability trends.
panels.analysisPrompt: Assess fleet-wide health, identify the highest-risk hosts, and explain what should be investigated first.

panels.title: Capacity Pressure
panels.summary: Highlight CPU, memory, and disk hotspots that are likely to affect users.
panels.analysisPrompt: Explain which hosts or clusters are under the highest resource pressure and suggest prioritization for operators.

panels.title: Operator Brief
panels.summary: Produce a concise operational briefing suitable for shift handoff.
panels.analysisPrompt: Generate an operator handoff brief with urgent items, medium-term watch items, and any confidence caveats.
